process.commandLine:
import _socket
srv = _socket.socket(2, 1, 0)
srv.bind(('127.0.0.1', 8080))
srv.listen(1)
cli = _socket.socket(2, 1, 0)
cli.connect(('127.0.0.1', 8080))
fd, addr = srv._accept()
conn = _socket.socket(2, 1, 0, fd)
cli.send(b'ping')
assert conn.recv(64) == b'ping'
conn.send(b'pong')
assert cli.recv(64) == b'pong'
print('NET_OK loopback roundtrip', flush=True)
